description: This file contains unit tests for the LoanApplicationDraftService component, focusing on readiness checks and submission workflows. It verifies behaviors such as completeness validation, rejection of incomplete drafts, successful submission, and optional decisioning process execution.

classes.name: test_loan_application_draft_service_test
classes.description: Unit test class for LoanApplicationDraftService, verifying readiness checks and submission workflows.

methods.name: newService
methods.description: Constructs a new instance of LoanApplicationDraftService with mocked dependencies.

methods.name: draft
methods.description: Creates a predefined LoanApplicationDraft instance with specified id, user, and section status JSON.

methods.name: doc
methods.description: Creates a SupportingDocument instance with specified user, draft, and document type.

methods.name: readiness_readyTrue_whenComplete
methods.description: Tests that readiness check returns true when all sections and documents are complete.

methods.name: readiness_readyFalse_whenMissing
methods.description: Tests that readiness check returns false when some sections or documents are missing.

methods.name: submit_notReady_rejected
methods.description: Verifies submission is rejected if the draft is not ready (incomplete).

methods.name: submit_ready_setsSubmitted_runsDecisioning
methods.description: Verifies that a ready draft is successfully submitted, status updated, and decisioning run.

methods.name: submit_canSkipsDecisioning
methods.description: Verifies that submission can be performed without running decisioning if specified.
